rationale: The agent successfully traced the entire code path from the ViewModel (ShowtimesPageViewModel) through the Redux middleware (ShowMiddleware) to the FinnkinoApi and finally to ShowParser. It read all relevant source files and correctly identified that the parser does not gracefully handle a missing <dttmShowStart> tag — xml_utils.dart's tagContents throws an ArgumentError, which propagates up and causes the entire schedule load to fail. The agent cited exact file paths and line numbers, noted that the project uses Redux not BLoC, and correctly identified the XML tag name as dttmShowStart (not StartTime). No code was modified. This is a clean task with full success.
